name: Upload queue page
description: Add a page that shows the device's current upload queue (via listUploadQueue) and lets the operator cancel stuck items (via cancelUpload). Helpful for diagnosing why a route is slow to appear in the dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Backend adds GET /v1/devices/:dongle_id/upload-queue that calls CallListUploadQueue and returns the list; POST /v1/devices/:dongle_id/upload-queue/cancel with body { ids: [...] } calls CallCancelUpload
503 if device is offline; session-or-JWT auth required for GET and session required for POST

web/src/app/devices/[dongleId]/upload-queue/page.tsx is a new Next.js page that polls the GET endpoint every 10s, renders a table (path, url, priority, retry_count, progress, allow_cellular), and has a 'Cancel' button on each row plus a 'Cancel all' action
Progress column renders current_byte / total_byte as a percentage (if both are present) or 'queued' / 'in-flight'
Backend unit tests cover online/offline branches and the cancel endpoint
pnpm --dir web lint, type-check, build pass
